articles.title: Maharashtra Weather Alert: Heatwave and Unseasonal Rain to Hit 16 Districts on April 23; IMD Issues Yellow Alert - PUNE PULSE
articles.full_text:
Maharashtra faces a dual weather threat as heatwave conditions combine with unseasonal rain. IMD issues a yellow alert for 16 districts including Pune, Mumbai, and Kolhapur.
Maharashtra, April 22, 2026:
The India Meteorological Department (IMD) has issued a yellow alert for 16 districts across Maharashtra on April 23, warning of a dual weather impact of heatwave conditions and unseasonal rainfall. The forecast indicates fluctuating weather patterns, with several regions likely to experience thunderstorms, gusty winds, and rising humidity levels.
Even in districts without an official alert, the IMD has predicted light to moderate rainfall, signaling a broader shift in weather conditions across the state.
Konkan Region
Districts including Thane, Mumbai, Raigad, Sindhudurg, and Ratnagiri are likely to witness heatwave conditions coupled with unseasonal rain.
High humidity is expected to intensify discomfort, with intermittent rainfall under a yellow alert.
Western Maharashtra
In Pune, Kolhapur, Satara, Sangli, and Solapur, cloudy skies and afternoon thunderstorms are expected.
Some areas may experience lightning and brief spells of rain later in the day.
Marathwada Region
Districts such as Nanded, Dharashiv, and Latur are under a yellow alert for rainfall with gusty winds.
Meanwhile, Nashik, Chhatrapati Sambhajinagar, Jalna, Parbhani, Beed, and Hingoli are not under alert, but may still receive light to moderate rainfall.
Vidarbha Region
Across Vidarbha, intense heat conditions will persist.
Advisory
The IMD has urged citizens to remain cautious amid the combined impact of heat and rain, advising adequate hydration, avoidance of direct sun exposure, and preparedness for sudden weather changes.
With April 23 expected to bring a mix of heatwave and rainfall across Maharashtra, residents are advised to stay updated with official forecasts and take necessary precautions.
